glosses.es: lavar los platos; lavar para quitar
glosses.fr: faire la vaisselle; laver pour enlever
glosses.pt: lavar a louça; lavar para remover
glosses.ro: a spăla vase; a spăla (a îndepărta)
glosses.ja: 食器を洗う; 洗い落とす

translations.en: I need to do the dishes soon.
translations.es: Tengo que lavar los platos pronto.
translations.fr: Je dois faire la vaisselle bientôt.
translations.it: Devo lavare i piatti tra poco.
translations.pt: Preciso lavar a louça daqui a pouco.
translations.he: אני צריך לשטוף כלים עוד מעט.
translations.nl: Ik moet zo de afwas doen.
translations.hi: मुझे जल्द ही बर्तन धोने हैं।
translations.el: Πρέπει να πλύνω τα πιάτα σύντομα.
translations.ro: Trebuie să spăl vasele în curând.
translations.ja: もうすぐ皿洗いをしないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary; finite present (1st sg) agreeing with 'Ich'; expresses necessity; selects bare infinitive 'abwaschen'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the predicate, meaning 'soon/right away'.
Infinitive separable verb (ab+waschen); lexical main verb complement to the modal; ‘to do the dishes/wash up’.

translations.en: Nobody wants to do the dishes today.
translations.es: Hoy nadie quiere lavar los platos.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, personne ne veut faire la vaisselle.
translations.it: Oggi nessuno vuole lavare i piatti.
translations.ru: Сегодня никто не хочет мыть посуду.
translations.pt: Hoje ninguém quer lavar a louça.
translations.he: היום אף אחד לא רוצה לשטוף כלים.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chẳng ai muốn rửa bát.
translations.ar: اليوم لا أحد يريد غسل الصحون.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ніхто не хоче мити посуд.
translations.hi: आज कोई भी बर्तन धोना नहीं चाहता।
translations.pl: Dzisiaj nikt nie chce zmywać naczyń.
translations.el: Σήμερα κανείς δεν θέλει να πλύνει τα πιάτα.
translations.nb: I dag vil ingen vaske opp.
translations.id: Hari ini tidak ada yang mau cuci piring.
translations.ro: Astăzi nu vrea nimeni să spele vasele.
translations.da: I dag er der ingen, der vil vaske op.
translations.ja: 今日は誰も皿洗いをしたがらない。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb; clause-initial frame-setter; modifies the predicate.
Modal auxiliary; finite present (3rd sg) with subject 'keiner'; expresses volition; selects bare infinitive 'abwaschen'.
Indefinite pronoun; nominative singular; acts as the subject meaning 'no one'.
Infinitive separable verb (ab+waschen); main lexical verb complement to the modal.

sentences.target: Nach dem Essen möchte ich abwaschen.

translations.de: Nach dem Essen möchte ich abwaschen.
translations.en: After dinner, I’d like to do the dishes.
translations.es: Después de cenar, me gustaría lavar los platos.
translations.fr: Après le dîner, j'aimerais faire la vaisselle.
translations.it: Dopo cena, vorrei lavare i piatti.
translations.ko: 저녁 먹고 나서 제가 설거지하고 싶어요.
translations.yue: 食完晚飯之後我想洗碗。
translations.ru: После ужина я хотел бы помыть посуду.
translations.pt: Depois do jantar, eu gostaria de lavar a louça.
translations.he: אחרי ארוחת הערב אשמח לשטוף כלים.
translations.tr: Akşam yemeğinden sonra bulaşıkları yıkamak istiyorum.
translations.vi: Ăn tối xong tôi muốn rửa bát.
translations.nl: Na het eten wil ik afwassen.
translations.uk: Після вечері я хотів би помити посуд.
translations.hi: रात के खाने के बाद मैं बर्तन धोना चाहूँगा।
translations.el: Μετά το δείπνο θα ήθελα να πλύνω τα πιάτα.
translations.nb: Etter middagen vil jeg gjerne vaske opp.
translations.id: Setelah makan malam, saya ingin mencuci piring.
translations.sv: Efter middagen vill jag gärna diska.
translations.ro: După cină, aș vrea să spăl vasele.
translations.cs: Po večeři bych rád umyl nádobí.
translations.da: Efter aftensmaden vil jeg gerne vaske op.
translations.ja: 夕食の後、皿洗いをしたいです。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; heads the temporal PP 'Nach dem Essen'.
Definite article; dative singular (masc/neut) agreeing with 'Essen' in the PP.
Noun; object of 'Nach' within the PP; denotes the meal/eating event.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II form); finite 1st sg; polite desiderative; selects infinitive 'abwaschen'.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Infinitive separable verb (ab+waschen); main lexical verb complement to the modal.

translations.en: She has the kids do the dishes.
translations.es: Hace que los niños laven los platos.
translations.fr: Elle fait faire la vaisselle aux enfants.
translations.it: Fa lavare i piatti ai bambini.
translations.pt: Ela manda as crianças lavar a louça.
translations.he: היא מטילה על הילדים לשטוף כלים.
translations.vi: Cô ấy giao cho bọn trẻ rửa bát.
translations.hi: वह बच्चों से बर्तन धुलवाती है।
translations.el: Βάζει τα παιδιά να πλύνουν τα πιάτα.
translations.nb: Hun får barna til å vaske opp.
translations.ro: Îi pune pe copii să spele vasele.
translations.da: Hun får børnene til at vaske op.
translations.ja: 彼女は子どもたちに皿洗いをさせる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular feminine; subject.
Lexical verb; finite present (3rd sg); causative construction taking NP 'die Kinder' and bare infinitive 'abwaschen'.
Definite article; plural (accusative here); determiner of 'Kinder'.
Noun; plural; direct object of 'lässt' and controller (understood subject) of the embedded infinitive.
Infinitive separable verb (ab+waschen); embedded non-finite predicate licensed by 'lassen'.
